description: CompositionWhite polo t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a contrast coloured ribbed collar, half buttoned placket, branding embroidered on the left chest, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs and a vented hemFitRegularWash careWash similar colours togetherMachine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergentDo not wring, bleach, or iron on printFlat dry in shademanchester united's flair for understated and focussed minimalism, is seen in this finely structured polo t-shirt. The label's ability to polish classic pieces with a contemporary vibe, references a Beckham-esque style. Wear this with denims, a jacket and casual shoes. This piece also goes perfectly with tracks and sports shoes. Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
